subcodes.first_line: O Physician of the hearts of God's loved ones! In this day grievous maladies and diverse ailments have afflicted the bodies [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @call to action, @The Holy Spirit
